home.heroSub: Access founders. Build with AI. Enter a real ecosystem. Where ambitious builders meet operators, ship projects, and gain leverage their peers will not have.
home.updatesTitle: News, recaps, and AI workflow notes for members and builders.
home.hostTitle: Build the room your city should already have.
home.hostSub: If you have the venue, the local context, and the ability to gather serious people, host an AI Unplugged session with us. We care more about room quality than event count.
home.valueTitle: Not a course. Not a club.
home.spotlightTitleMany: Choose the room that fits your build cycle.
home.spotlightSubMany: A quick scan of the next rooms we are opening. Compare the formats, then head to the events list to choose the right one.
home.nodeLeadSub: Not an ambassador. Not a brand rep. You help shape AI Unplugged in your city, campus, or builder community by bringing the right people into the room.

about.label: About
about.title: A room for the people
about.subtitle: AI Unplugged exists because most AI communities optimize for content consumption. We optimize for the people shipping things.
about.whatIsBodyOne: AI Unplugged is an events-first ecosystem. Builders Nights, Build Rooms, Demo Days, and Talent x Founder Exchanges, each format is designed to produce output, not attendance.
about.whatIsBodyTwo: We run inside the House of Starts startup ecosystem, which means the founders and operators you meet here are operating real companies, not selling courses.
about.whatIsNotBodyOne: Not a course. Not a paid community. Not a YouTube channel. Not a Discord with 10,000 people and no signal.
about.whatIsNotBodyTwo: We keep rooms small on purpose. If an event is application-based, it's because there is a ceiling on how many people we let in, and we are intentional about who gets the seat.
about.whoRunsBody: A small core team operating out of House of Starts, supported by Node Leads across cities, campuses, and local builder communities. Node Leads are the reason this scales without losing signal.
about.ecosystemBody: We are part of House of Starts, a physical startup hub. The connection is practical: the founders in that ecosystem are directly in the rooms we build.
about.eventsBody: Every room we're opening: flagship nights, build rooms, demo days, and exchanges.
about.attendBody: Pick an event, tell us who you are and what you're building. Reviewed by the team.
about.nodeLeadBody: Own AI Unplugged in your city, campus, or community. Curate the builders. Run the events. Get direct ecosystem access.

nodeLead.label: Run your local node
nodeLead.title: Become a
nodeLead.subtitle: Not an ambassador. Not a brand rep. You'll help own AI Unplugged in your city, campus, or builder community, pick the builders, run the events, and bring the right people into the room.
nodeLead.cardOneBody: Build Rooms, Builders Nights, and showcases in your city, campus, or community, with ecosystem backing and operational support from the core team.
nodeLead.cardTwoBody: You'll be in the core group. Founders, operators, and partner companies are introduced to you directly. No filter.
nodeLead.cardThreeBody: When you ship events that produce builders, people notice. This becomes something you point to, not a line on a resume, a reputation.
nodeLead.lookForSub: We're slow about picking Node Leads. Every bad fit sets back the local builder community by months.
nodeLead.pointOne: You've organized something before, even informally.
nodeLead.pointTwo: You're hands-on with AI. Not just curious, actively building or using it.
nodeLead.pointThree: You care about who's in the room more than how many are in the room.
nodeLead.pointFour: You can commit around 6 hours a week for the first two months.

events.title: Every room
events.subtitle: Flagship nights. Build rooms. Demo days. Talent exchanges. Filter by format. Click any event to attend.
events.empty: No events match this filter yet. Check back soon or

updates.title: What the platform
updates.subtitle: News, event recaps, AI workflow notes, and practical updates from the rooms we are building.

eventDetail.notFoundSub: We couldn't find that event. It might have been renamed or removed.

updateDetail.author: Author
updateDetail.commentsDisabled: Comments are disabled for this update.
updateDetail.notFoundSub: That update either does not exist yet or has not been published.

attend.label: Attend
attend.title: Tell us who
attend.subtitle: Applications are reviewed by the team. We look for builders, people shipping, not just watching. Takes about 3 minutes.
attend.lookForSub: We don't read resumes. We read what you're building and why.
attend.pointOne: You're shipping something, even rough, even broken.
attend.pointTwo: You can be specific about why this event, not just "to network."
attend.pointThree: You'll show up. Seats are limited and waitlists are real.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.title: Member dashboard.

dashboard.getInvolvedSub: Interested in hosting an AI Unplugged session or becoming a Node Lead in your region?
